completed_tasks.name: Approve and integrate the v1.0 two-hour prototype requirements and roadmap

remaining_tasks.name: Create the Phase 1 plan for the six-state mobile wireframe
Implement and validate the Phase 1 wireframe
Complete Phases 2 through 4 from the approved roadmap

human_actions_pending.action: Explicitly approve any later prototype-worktree merge
human_actions_pending.context: No prototype branch merge was applied, and the prior escalation was declined. Do not retry implicitly.

decisions.decision: Use a mobile-only six-state sequence: welcome, zodiac transition, optional birthday, conditional personal reveal, current-month reading, then moon/Friday upcoming.
decisions.rationale: This is the user-approved wireframe and supersedes the PRD's earlier order.

decisions.decision: Allow welcome and birthday to skip directly to the current-month reading.
decisions.rationale: The month reading must provide value without requiring personal data.

decisions.decision: Use a continuous vertical page with soft proximity settling and easeInOutCubic for visual/programmatic transitions.
decisions.rationale: The experience should settle near full-screen sections without hard scroll snapping or scroll traps.

decisions.decision: Use the Blue Zodiac full-screen at welcome, then full-width, then as a top-edge arc over a matching light-paper background.
decisions.rationale: This is the approved visual progression; the source image and paper background must become separate elements.

decisions.decision: Keep v1 deterministic and client-only with bundled typed data.
decisions.rationale: No runtime AI, database, account, or server is needed for the prototype.

decisions.decision: Treat the moon display as a symbolic Hebrew-calendar state, not an exact astronomical phase.
decisions.rationale: Astronomical calculations, birth time, location, sunset rollover, and time zones are deferred.

decisions.decision: Make the current month rich and allow lightweight templates for the other eleven birth profiles.
decisions.rationale: This preserves complete birthday coverage within the two-hour prototype constraint.

uncommitted_files: NoteBookLM Report.md (pre-existing untracked user file; do not stage)
src/ (pre-existing untracked user assets, including Blue Zodiac and fonts/glyph art; do not stage wholesale)
next_action: Read the handoff and source-of-truth planning files, then create and review the Phase 1 PLAN.md before writing implementation code.
context_notes: Planning and PRD-gap validation are complete. No wireframe implementation or sketch file was created. The empty Phase 1 and sketch directories may remain. Preserve unrelated user changes and do not retry the prototype-worktree merge without explicit approval.
